name: API Documentation
description:
---

## **Introduction**

SurveySparrow API allows you to integrate third party applications in your enterprise ecosystem and helps you to automate workflows like, sending a survey when a ticket is closed or a employee leaves the organisation.

### Request & Response Format
SurveySparrow API accepts HTTPS requests with JSON Arguments. The response will be in JSON format. Our Authentication is based on OAuth 2.0 and you can pass your access token over Authorization header as "bearer token"

## **Authentication**

SurveySparrow uses OAuth 2.0 for Authentication . You need to use the generated access token in request header as "bearer token" (-H "Authorization: Bearer Your_ACCESS_TOKEN ")

### Generate Access Token

You can Generate Access Token using the following steps:
1. Login to your SurveySparrow account and go to Settings → Apps & Integrations.
2. Create a Custom App.
3. Enter Name, Description, select scope, and generate the access token.
4. Copy and store the access token (Access token will be displayed only once and you may need to re-generate if you misplaced it).
5. Save your app and you are good to start developing your custom app.

## **Scopes**

While creating an app you can define the scope or privilege for the API token to communicate with your surveysparrow account. Following are the available scopes and permissions currently supported in SurveySparrow API.

| **Scope**                       | **Permission**                                           |
|---------------------------------|----------------------------------------------------------|
| View Contacts                   | List Contacts                                            |
| Manage Contacts                 | Create Contacts, Update Contacts                         |
| View Contact Lists              | List Contact Lists                                       |
| Manage Contact List             | Create Contact List, Update Contact List                 |
| View Employees                  | View your employees                                      |
| Manage Employees                | Modify your employees, add new employees                 |
| View Employee List              | View your employee list                                  |
| Manage Employee List            | Modify your employee list, add new employee lists        |
| View Survey                     | List Surveys                                             |
| Manage Survey                   | Create and edit survey                                   |
| View Responses                  | List Responses                                           |
| Manage Share Survey             | Update Share                                             |
| View Survey Settings            | View the survey settings you created                     |
| View Survey Integrations        | View Survey Integrations for survey                      |
| Manage Survey Settings          | Edit your survey settings                                |
| View Question                   | View the question you created                            |
| Manage Questions                | Create and edit questions                                |
| View Variables                  | View the variables created for survey                    |
| View Expressions                | View the expressions created for survey                  |
| Manage Variables                | Create and delete survey variables                       |
| View Themes                     | View your themes                                         |
| Manage Responses                | Manage Responses                                         |
| View Webhooks                   | View Webhooks of Survey                                  |
| Manage Webhooks                 | Modify your webhooks, add new webhooks                   |
| View Questions                  | View Questions in a Survey                               |
| Manage Shares                   | Manage shares of a survey                                |
| Manage Offline Devices          | Manage Offline Devices                                   |
| View Workspace                  | View Your Workspace                                      |
| Manage Workspace                | Manage your account workspace                            |
| Manage 360 Invite               | Manage 360 invitees of Survey                            |
| View 360 Invite                 | View 360 invite                                          |
| View 360 Reports of Survey      | View 360 reports of Survey                               |
| Manage Team                     | Manage teams in your account                             |
| View Team                       | View Teams in your account                               |
| View User                       | View User in your account                                |
| Manage User                     | Manage user in your account                              |
| View Targets                    | View Targets                                             |
| View Audit Logs                 | View Audit Logs                                          |
| Manage Audit Logs               | Manage Audit Logs                                        |
| View Tickets                    | View Tickets in your account                             |
| Manage Tickets                  | Create, Edit and Delete tickets in your account          |
| View Ticket Comments            | View comments for tickets in account                     |
| Manage Ticket Comments          | Manage comments for Tickets in account                   |
| View Ticket Fields              | View the fields of Tickets in your account               |
| Create Dashboards and Widgets   | Create dashboards and widgets for survey                 |
| View Dashboards and Widgets     | View dashboards and widgets for survey                   |
| View Reputation App Platforms   | View the app platforms for account in reputation         |
| View Reputation Reviews         | View Reviews of Reputation for account                   |


## **Error Handling**

SurveySparrow uses standard HTTP status codes like 2xx for success and 4xx for failure . Please refer the following table for status codes.

| **Status Code**           | **Permission**                                                              |
|---------------------------|-----------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| 200 OK                    | Request is successful                                                       |
| 202 Accepted              | Request accepted but it is queued or processing                             |
| 400 Bad Request           | Request has missing required parameters or validation errors                |
| 401 Unauthorized          | Bad Token or missing token                                                  |
| 403 Forbidden             | Access denied for the requested resource                                    |
| 404 Not Found             | The requested resource doesn’t exist                                        |
| 409 Conflict              | Request conflicts with another, trying to create already existing resource  |
| 429 Too Many Requests     | Api request limit exceeded                                                  |
| 500 Internal Server Error | Something went wrong in Surveysparrow                                       |



Some of the error code above will give you a deeper level of information just like below


| **Error Type**      | **Description**                                                            |
|---------------------|----------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| missing_scope       | Token doesn’t have the requested resource scope                            |
| backend_error       | Error in Surveysparrow servers                                             |
| already_exist       | The resource trying to create already exists                               |
| permission_denied   | You don’t have the access rights for the requested resource                |
| not_found           | The requested resource is not available in the system                      |
| not_active          | Resource is not active now, so you can’t perform the operation             |
| limit_exceeded      | You have reached your hourly quota                                         |
| disabled            | The app or integration is disabled by the creator                          |
| bad_token           | Due to any of the following reasons: Invalid token, Token expired, user revoked the access |

## **Rate Limit**

Currently our API is rate limited based on the quota of the user on per hour, per day and per minute basis. Once you exceed this, API responds with an error code 429 (Too Many requests).

## **Pagination**

You can use our pagination with limit and page parameter to navigate when your list exceed our default maximum number of results . When you exceed this you can paginate using Page params (Ex:- https://api.surveysparrow.com/v3/contacts?limit=100&page=2)

__Note: To be passed as query parameter__

| **Name**     | **Description**                     |
|--------------|-------------------------------------|
| limit        | No of results needed in a request   |
| page         | Page No                             |

__Note: For all GET calls you can use option params to paginate__
